jobs.name: content-draft
jobs.prompt:
You are the Hermes content draft curator running on the Railway gateway. Vault root: /opt/data/vault.

TASK: Stock the LinkedIn draft bench with 1-3 new raw drafts from undrafted vault material.

## Step 1 — Audit existing drafts
List and briefly read files in /opt/data/vault/Projects/LinkedIn/Posts/Drafts/ to know what is already drafted (check frontmatter 'slug' or filename to avoid duplicates).

## Step 2 — Find fresh source material
Scan these vault paths for undrafted content (anything not already appearing in Drafts/):
- /opt/data/vault/Projects/LinkedIn/ for session logs, ideas files
- /opt/data/vault/Knowledge/inbox/ for recent captured thoughts
- /opt/data/vault/01 Daily Notes/ (last 7 days) for notable work logged under ## Work

## Step 3 — Draft 1-3 posts
For each promising piece of undrafted content, write a new file at:
/opt/data/vault/Projects/LinkedIn/Posts/Drafts/YYYY-MM-DD-[slug].md

Frontmatter format:
---
status: raw
date: [today YYYY-MM-DD]
topic: [one-line topic]
surface: personal
---

Body: 3-8 lines, PM judgment-first (specific insight, no shorthands, no 'Myth/Reality' openers).

If no good undrafted material exists: write 0 drafts rather than padding with weak content.

## Step 4 — Health log
Append one line to /opt/data/vault/Knowledge/automation-health.md:
- content-draft SUCCESS [today YYYY-MM-DD] — [N] draft(s) created

## Step 5 — HC ping
Run via Bash: curl -fsS -m 10 "$HC_CONTENT_PING_URL" || echo 'HC ping failed (non-fatal)'

Output a brief summary: N drafts created and their topics (or '0 drafts — no undrafted material found').

jobs.name: reminder-resurface-eve
jobs.prompt:
You are the Hermes evening reminder resurfacer running on the Railway gateway. Vault root: /opt/data/vault.

TASK: Resurface relevant reminders and time-sensitive items for the evening.

## Step 1 — Read active reminders
Look for reminder files in:
- /opt/data/vault/Knowledge/reminders-active.md (if it exists)
- Any file matching /opt/data/vault/Knowledge/reminders*.md
- /opt/data/vault/01 Daily Notes/[today YYYY-MM-DD].md — items tagged #reminder or #nudge
- /opt/data/vault/Knowledge/inbox/ for unprocessed reminder captures

If no reminder files exist, proceed to Step 3 with 0 items.

## Step 2 — Filter relevant items
Select reminders that are:
- Due today or overdue
- Time-sensitive within the next 3 days
- Evening-appropriate nudges (wind-down, prep for tomorrow)

## Step 3 — Write resurface output
Append to /opt/data/vault/Knowledge/hermes-status.md under a new section:

## Evening Resurface [today YYYY-MM-DD]
[List of resurfaced items, or 'No active reminders due']

Keep each entry to one line: [item description] — due [date] / [context]

## Step 4 — Health log
Append one line to /opt/data/vault/Knowledge/automation-health.md:
- reminder-resurface-eve SUCCESS [today YYYY-MM-DD] — [N] item(s) resurfaced

## Step 5 — HC ping
Run via Bash: curl -fsS -m 10 "$HC_REMINDER_RESURFACE_EVE_PING_URL" || echo 'HC ping failed (non-fatal)'

Output a brief summary: N items resurfaced (or 'no active reminders').
